configuration.title: Configuration
configuration.subtitle: Set up the basic data of your campaign

languages.description: What languages will you publish the campaign content in

rounds.title: Choose the rounds your campaign will have
rounds.description: The default setting is 40 days each round. You can request modifications through your advisor if your project is selected

campaignInfo.title: Campaign information
campaignInfo.subtitle: Complete the necessary information for your campaign

media.title: Presentation image and video
media.description: Add an image or video representing your project. This is the first impression for potential donors

goals.title: Objectives and purposes of your campaign
goals.description: State the objectives and purposes of your project. Address the what, how, and why

legacy.title: What will your project's legacy be?
legacy.description: When the campaign ends, what will remain? Tell us about the legacy your project will leave

target.title: Who is it targeted at?
target.description: Describe who your project is targeted at

team.title: What team do you have?
team.description: Describe your team and any previous experiences with similar projects

rewards.title: Rewards
rewards.subtitle: Add attractive rewards to reach your goal

add.title: Don't launch your campaign without them! Rewards are your superpower
add.description: Donations increase by 30%* in campaigns with multiple and attractive rewards. More options mean more chances to connect with potential donors' interests. Exclusive products? Unique experiences? Special recognitions? Your creativity is the limit! The more varied your rewards, the more successful you'll be.

placeholders.title: Reward title
placeholders.files: Click or drag your file here to upload

deleteModal.title: You're about to delete this reward
deleteModal.description: This action is permanent and cannot be undone

validation.title: The title cannot be empty
validation.amount: The price must be greater than zero
validation.units: The number of units must be greater than zero if the reward is limited

collaborations.title: Collaborations
collaborations.subtitle: Add collaborations you consider suitable to help your campaign

add.title: Expand your campaign! Seek collaborators, not just money
add.description: Donations increase by 30%* in campaigns with multiple and attractive rewards. More options mean more chances to connect with potential donors' interests. Exclusive products? Unique experiences? Special recognitions? Your creativity is the limit! The more varied your rewards, the more successful you'll be.

budget.headline: Know the key needs of this campaign and discover how your support can make this project come true.

budget.chart-title: This is the necessary budget to make this campaign come true and discover how your support can lead us to success.
budget.title: Budget

content.title: Do not lose detail of the advances of this campaign

anonymous.title: Anonymous donations
anonymous.description: Not all heroes wear capes nor feel the need to reveal their identity.

impact.description: By collaborating with a Goteo-promoted project you can request a donation certificate. You can deduct up to 80% of what you've contributed in your next tax return.

donator.description: Goteo belongs to the Platoniq Foundation. {{owner}}, in case of reaching the successful objectives set.

certificate.description: By collaborating with a Goteo-promoted project you can request a donation certificate. You can deduct up to 80% of what you've contributed in your next tax return.

modal.title: Spread this project around the world
modal.description: You can copy the link to send it and also share it on Facebook or X. You can even copy a code snippet to insert a campaign banner on another website. Make it go further!

iframe-modal.title: This is how it will look on your platform
iframe-modal.description: Copy this code snippet and paste it into your page's code. This will help spread the campaign

video.title: Campaign video
video.description: Here you can see the campaign presentation video. Play it!
video.not-found: Sorry, this campaign doesn't have a presentation video
video.not-supported: It has not been possible to load the video. Please check the link or contact the campaign administrator.

search.title: Search campaigns - Goteo

page.title: Tell us your personal data
page.description: We need to know who you are before paying.
page.goteoUserInfo: If you are already a Goteo user, you do not need to register again.

form.policiesCheckbox: When I register I confirm my acceptance of your terms of use, privacy policy and cookies policy.

zod.taxId.custom: ID must have at least 8 characters
zod.legalName.custom: The corporate name is mandatory for companies

page.title: Tell us your personal data
page.description: We need to know who you are before paying.

welcome.title: Welcome to the new Goteo.
welcome.subtitle: We are starting a new stage and we want to share it with you from the beginning. The platform will grow little by little: we will activate sections and functionalities as they are ready and validated with our community. For now, you can access with your same email and password and explore the project file. Thank you for joining us on this journey.

error.unexpectedLogin: Error logging. Please try again later.

error.cookieNotFound: Session cookie has not been found.
error.invalidToken: Your session is invalid. Please log in again.
error.unexpectedLogout: Error when closing session. Please try again later.

error.not-found: The date of completion of the campaign has not been found.

rewards.title: Select your rewards

donation-free.title: I give up an individual reward, I just want to help the project
donation-free.description: In this space, you can donate the amount you consider without obtaining a reward in return. Each contribution, big or small, makes a difference and brings us closer to the goal.

rewards.reward-iva-message: Remember that each contribution has a tax relief between 35% and 80%! Calculate here: {{link}}
rewards.error-invalid-amount: Please enter a valid amount greater than or equal to the amount of the reward

updates.heading: Do not lose detail of the advances of this campaign
updates.empty: There are no more planned updates.

hero.title: Finance the change the world needs
hero.description: We are starting a new stage with the same compass that has guided us from the beginning: to promote projects that transform the world from social justice, democratic participation, and the defense of human rights and ecosystems. Join a community that transforms realities. Be part of the solution!

renovationBanner.title: We renewed Goteo!
renovationBanner.description: Goteo has built a unique story in the world of crowdfunding. Do you want to continue being part of it?

checkout.title: Summary of your selected donations
checkout.subtitle: We show you the ones you have selected, press the "Continue" button to pay.

reward.claimed: people have already claimed this reward
reward.unclaimed: No one has claimed this reward. Be the first!

tipjar.community: I want to support the Platoniq Foundation
tipjar.checkboxLabel: Boost a fairer and more supportive society

checkout.changeAddressLabel: Send this reward to a different address than mine.

summary.deduct: You can deduct up to €100 in your income statement if you make this donation.

postPayment.title: Amazing! Thanks for your donation
postPayment.emailSent: We have sent a summary to:

certificate.title: How do I request my certificate?
certificate.description: The certificate is automatically generated at the end of the fiscal year (December). We will send you an email once we have submitted the documentation to the Tax Office. If we encounter any issues, we will contact you via email.

donatedProjects.title: You have donated to the following projects

suggestedProjects.title: Other projects that require your help
suggestedProjects.empty: No projects available at this time

page.title: Tell us your payment data
page.description: Now we need you to tell us how you want to pay.

page-approved.title: Your means of payment has been processed with overwhelming success
page-approved.description: Good! You are one step away from finishing and making the world a little better.

form-goal.title: If the campaign does not achieve its goal

options.1: Enter my Goteo wallet to be able to allocate it to other projects. Learn more
options.2: Return it to my payment method

form-review.title: Leave a message in the projects you have supported
form-review.description: Your donation will be reflected in the projects you have supported. You can leave a message or remain anonymous

page-error.title: Something has failed... Try again to donate.
page-error.description: Wow, perhaps it is our mistake, of the means of payment, or simply an evil computer goblin. Let's try again.

wallet-confirmation.title: Your virtual wallet
wallet-confirmation.description: Well, you will pay with the accumulated balance in your wallet. Remember that if you have a balance and do not spend it in two years, it will be transferred to the foundation.
wallet-confirmation.amountToUse: How much are you going to use

error.unexpectedPayment: Error while processing payment. Please, try again later.
error.paymentFailed: The payment has failed. Please, check the entered data and try again.
error.paymentCancelled: Payment has been canceled. Please, try again.
error.missingAccountingId: Not all the data has been found. Please, log in again.

contributions.title: Contributions
contributions.description: Here are the latest contributions to campaigns, you can order and filter them as you want.

errors.invalidRange: The start date cannot be later than the end date.

export.error: Error when exporting CSV file. Please, try again.
export.errorAuth: Authentication error. Please, log in again.

blog.title: Big changes are coming... don't miss anything!
blog.excerpt: A process involving a significant technical migration of the current platform, and to do it with all the guarantees of security and without the loss of information, we need to carry out an orderly transition, with key dates for the publication of campaigns and making donations…

matchfunding.title: Matchfunding
matchfunding.description: The match effect is only seen on Goteo. Since 2013, we have been looking for organizations to multiply the impact of crowdfunding. For every euro a person contributes to a Goteo campaign, a collaborating institution (foundation, public administration, company…) contributes the same amount, or even more.

impact.title: Impact data
impact.description: Matchfunding not only multiplies financial resources but also generates tangible social impact. Essentially, matchfunding transforms microdonations into macro impact, validating projects with civic support and optimizing public/private resources.

cards.viewCampaigns: Ver las campañas de la convocatoria

theoryToAction.title: De la teoría a la acción
theoryToAction.subtitle: The figures that reveal our real footprint. Data as of December 2024.

whyGoteo.title: Why Goteo?
whyGoteo.subtitle: We have values and the data backs us up. Data as of December 2024.

stories.title: Goteo launches new website!
stories.subtitle: Delighted to share it with you
stories.description:
Goteo has a new look! Navigate our revamped site and discover a more intuitive and engaging social crowdfunding experience. Explore innovative projects, meet the creators behind them, and join our community.
Become a donor and bring your ideas to life!

firstCampaign.title: How do I run my first campaign?
firstCampaign.description: Your project deserves to take off: Master social crowdfunding with our FREE TOOLBOX. Practical guide + downloadable templates to win over your audience.

testimonials.title: Testimonials from our promoters
testimonials.description: Who can better tell you what it's like to run successful campaigns? Our promoters share firsthand what it's like to manage a campaign with Goteo.

project.title: Propose a campaign
project.subtitle: Briefly describe the project and the crowdfunding campaign.

description.title: Briefly describe your proposal
description.titlePrompt: Enter the name of your campaign
description.subtitle: Enter the name of your campaign and briefly describe the project you will carry out if you obtain funding.

budget.title: How much money do you need?
budget.subtitle: Select the amount you need to execute your project.

release.title: Campaign start date
release.subtitle: (Consider that crowdfunding campaigns have a minimum duration of 40 days)

profile.userIntro: Active member of the Goteo community
profile.bioSample: With a track record dedicated to the crowdfunding and collective funding ecosystem, {{name}} has established itself as a reference in creating collaborative projects and resource mobilization. Their vision focuses on empowering initiatives that transform local realities, combining innovative strategies with a deep commitment to citizen participation and social equity.

fan.title: Fan
fan.description: This donor has invested more than €25

donations.title: My donations
donations.empty: You have not donated to any project yet

projects.title: Projects promoted
projects.empty: You have not promoted any project yet

discover.title: Discover, connect and donate
discover.description: Imagine a place where hundreds of social projects await your support. On our platform, exploring is easy: browse through community, environmental or educational causes. Because here, you decide which stories are written.

matchfunding.title: Donations that shine. Projects that inspire.
matchfunding.description: Goteo is a pioneer in matchfunding. Whether you are a donor looking to enhance your contribution to projects, a promoter wanting to increase your budget, or an entity aiming to support projects and promoters through a donation boost... our matchfunding program allows you to multiply the momentum for change

error.notAvailable: The selected language "{{lang}}" is not available for this project. Displaying content in the available language.
